payload.description: Select Bus Service project for the Southern Brooklyn east-west corridor along Kings Hwy and Flatlands Ave

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study (2009) identified the Southern Brooklyn east-west corridor as a priority service need
